creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 217795
patch

Upstream now supports powerpc64. It was implemented in https://github.com/openresty/luajit2/commit/2763a421d6219c8cb2bbd39246de619dc796bab6, but https://github.com/openresty/luajit2/commit/981ec8d2aac5cac76bdedd4015b6d32447b29597 is also necessary (the former commit partially adds code that the latter one removes). This fixes powerpc64.
